summary: The video shows a car driving on a two-lane road with trees lining both sides. The sky appears overcast, suggesting rainy conditions. A white minibus overtakes the vehicle from the left side, passing closely enough to create a sense of urgency.

events_timeline.event: A white minibus overtakes the vehicle from the left side, passing closely enough to create a sense of urgency.

uncertainties: The speed of the minibus relative to the ego-vehicle is unclear.
Whether the minibus intends to pass quickly or cautiously is uncertain.

risk_assessment.why: The minibus overtaking the ego-vehicle creates a sense of urgency, indicating a potential risk of collision if the ego-vehicle fails to react appropriately.
